{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Celestial Radiance
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Celestial Radiance]] is an ability to transfer power to an heir.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Celestial Radiance]] [[sacred artists]] are assumed to have superior spiritual defenses.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
